text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the first day back at school after the break,
but Seiun Sky seems a little unsteady on her feet.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, hey there, Trainer. My battery's already
outta juice.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, every time I went somewhere to rest, I
found myself wanting to do stuff instead.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Just yesterday I was reading a famous book on
war strategies. It was pretty fascinating.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: There was actually this one part where...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uhh... Hm, my noggin's just not working.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's even sleepier than usual today.
